feed.title: Corpus-based Studies across Humanities
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Corpus-based Studies across Humanities (De Gruyter)

entry.title: A Corpus-Based Analysis of “Ageing Population” Discourse in Hong Kong Legislative Council Hansards

entry.summary: Authors: Nan Zhang, Lihe Huang, Deyu Zhou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/csh-2025-0019 Pages: Page range: 313-341

entry.summary: Authors: Jemima Asabea Anderson, Clement K. I. Appah, Rachel G. A. Thompson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/csh-2025-0015 Pages: Page range: 343-368

entry.summary: Authors: Tolulope Akinseye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/csh-2025-0013 Pages: Page range: 369-392
